title: aeon-ai v0.1.0 – AeonAI Core: Self-reflective mirror-based AI with CREP, Unified Lagrangian & Sigillin Bridges
description: aeon-ai is the central self-reflective engine of the GenesisAeon stack. It fuses resonance-weighted AeonLayer coupling, unified Lagrangian dynamics, CREP evaluation, Sigillin symbolic mirroring and MirrorCore phase-transitions into one production-ready package. 195 tests @ 99.71% coverage.
